text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
With results like these, I've got no right to be
called Empress.
choice_data_list: Don't let it get to you too much.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Win or lose, the next race awaits. I can't let
failure cloud my future.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I am fully aware of that. However, I refuse to let
these feelings go to waste.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This frustration and anger... I'll bring all of it to
bear in the next race!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh... You're saying I have to earn the title of
Empress?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Quite the simplistic conclusion. It's very like you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But I suppose a simple problem calls for a simple
solution—if I'm not worthy, then I just have to
keep working until I am!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I must take myself to task for my shortcomings.
